label: Emporio Italia (VL Validation Lab UUID)
summary: VL Emporio UUID has 0 invoice_items because the entire invoice row was deleted via removeRow() in the UI. This is NOT an empty-extraction wipe. Emporio data exists under replacement invoice ab52796d with 8 items.

rootCause.cascade: invoice_items.invoice_id REFERENCES invoices(id) ON DELETE CASCADE — all items removed with parent
rootCause.triggeringIncident: Jun 11 concurrent re-read produced 16 duplicate rows on 17aa3591; user re-uploaded as ab52796d then deleted corrupted original

whyDbZeroButV31Eight.dbZero: Invoice 17aa3591 no longer exists in invoices table — queries return 0 items
whyDbZeroButV31Eight.v31Eight: extract-invoice v31 works correctly on Emporio PNG (geometry-audit image); unrelated to deleted DB record

emptyExtractionWipe.reason: runExtraction only DELETEs invoice_items, not invoices. Would leave invoice header row.

manualDelete.reason: removeRow deletes invoices row + storage file; CASCADE removes items
manualDelete.evidence: invoice 17aa3591 absent; replacement ab52796d exists same supplier

reReadFailureDeleteOnly.reason: DELETE in runExtraction targets invoice_items only

concurrentDuplicateRace.reason: Jun 11 22:41 produced 16 rows — likely motivated delete + re-upload
concurrentDuplicateRace.notFinalCause: Race alone would leave 16 or 8 rows, not 0 with missing invoice

dataLossRisk.detail: Old VL UUID data intentionally removed; replacement invoice has 8 rows. VL harness/fixtures still reference deleted UUID.

otherInvoicesAffected.detail: 5/5 remaining VL invoices exist with 7-11 items each. Aviludo April was previously empty-wiped but recovered Jun 12.

operationalImpact.dashboard: VL UUID shows nothing; live Emporio (ab52796d) contributes €327.46 header, 8 lines
operationalImpact.opportunities: No price_history on either Emporio invoice — limited inflation signals from Emporio
operationalImpact.supplierIntelligence: Emporio scan uses invoice_items — works on ab52796d, absent for deleted UUID
operationalImpact.ingredientMatching: No confirmed Emporio aliases in DB; matching depends on catalog fuzzy match
operationalImpact.vlHarness: All .tmp audits referencing 17aa3591 see 0 DB rows — update fixture ID or re-seed

recommendations: Update VL Validation Lab fixture to use ab52796d OR re-create 17aa3591 if UUID stability required
Re-read ab52796d with v31 to sync stale Jun 11 extraction to current deploy
No urgent data recovery — deletion appears intentional after duplicate incident
